--- LOG ENTRY ---
ID: ~81948776
Author: responder8@irorg.com
Date: 23/04/2026 12:44
Type: case_task_log
Message: Analysis using MISP and the SIEM logs. we identify the following through event id **1866**
1. The initial access payload trigger was from **ws-user03.irorg.local**. The suspicious binary was executed from **%TEMP%\update_213.exe**. Then the attacker established a c2 connection to **servicewikii.com** 
2. The attacker executed a powershell encoded payload which gave the attacker access to another workstation **ws-user04.irorg.local**.  The attacker executed another binary **svchost.exe**, this to evade detection. The connected to an external beacon server **88.119.174.129**. 
3. The attacker then cleared the event log to evade forensic evidence. He proceed to compromise the domain controller by logging in as **admin_ir**.
4. After the dc access, he then proceeded to gain access to the web server infra **srv-web01.irorg.local**. Then executed a binary **df.exe** which is the data encryption binary.
